docket_entries.description: HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT PERKINS, LA RUE HEARING SET FOR MAY-15-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, CALENDAR OF MAY-15-1995 IN CONSIDERG LARUE PERKIN'S CLM TO RT TO POSS COURT ORDERS WRIT OF POSS STAYED FR.EXEC ON 5/17/95 FOR PD.NOT EXCEEDG.30 DAYS &W/IN 3DAYS FR.DATE OF THIS ORDR CLAIMNT REMIT TO PLFF' CSL $500 BE POSTD IN TRUST FUND PENDING COURT DET.AS TO WHE- EHER CLMT ENTITLD TO CLM OF RT TO POSS(MORE ORDERS,SEE FILE)

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, LONNETTE COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-18-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT 07. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. REPORTER: MARILYN NORMAN. CLERK: G. SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT. DEFT MOT FOR CONT DENIED; NO GOOD CAUSE. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED. CLOSING ARGUMENTS BY BOTH SIDES. CASE STANDS SUBMITTED. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY COURT.
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT PERKINS, ELAINE YVONNE
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, LONNETTE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERKINS, ELAINE YVONNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2763 BUSH STREET, APT D, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $1,833.16 RENT, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,028.16, LEASE FORFEITED, BACK RENT AND DAMAGES AMOUNT INCLUDES BACK RENT & DAMAGES THROUGH 4-19-95 PLUS PER DIEM DAMAGES OF $16.66.
